question.text: The PFRDA board consists of a chairperson and how many members?

answer.text: Three whole-time and three part-time members
Four whole-time and two part-time members
Two whole-time and four part-time members
Five whole-time and one part-time member

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The PFRDA board comprises a chairperson, three whole-time members, and three part-time members, all appointed by the Central Government. **The Trap:** The composition is specific — 3+3 (whole-time + part-time). This is different from SEBI's composition. Don't confuse the two. **Cross-Exam Context:** Board composition of regulators is tested across NISM exams: SEBI (Series XII), RBI, IRDAI (Series X-B), and PFRDA (Series XVII). **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The 5-year tenure for chairperson and members with eligibility for re-appointment ensures stability in pension sector regulation.
